task_completion.description: Verify that an Activity log is being created or viewed in the farmOS Field Kit app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screenshot should show the farmOS Field Kit interface with an 'Activity' log form open.

task_completion.description: Verify the date of the Activity log is set to April 18, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field in the Activity log should display '2024-04-18' or 'April 18, 2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Notes field contains the required emergency frost protection documentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Notes text area should contain the specified text. Look for key phrases: 'Emergency frost protection', 'Block C', '28F', and 'AGRI 301'.

task_completion.description: Verify a quantity value of '6' is recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A quantity field or section should show the value '6'.

task_completion.description: Verify the quantity label is 'Protection Duration'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The label associated with the quantity should explicitly say 'Protection Duration'.
The unit associated with the quantity should say 'hours'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the farmOS Field Kit app rather than a text editor or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should clearly be the farmOS Field Kit application (web or mobile view), not Notepad, a terminal window, or a generic browser search page.

integrity.description: Verify the information is entered into the correct form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text and values should be populated in their respective designated input fields (Date, Notes, Quantity Value/Label/Unit) within the app's form, rather than pasted as a single block of text in a single field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing curl commands, API requests, or script executions to inject the data directly into farmOS.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an Activity log in the farmOS Field Kit app. Expected Date: '2024-04-18' or 'April 18, 2024'. The Notes field must contain the provided text, verifiable by key phrases: 'Emergency frost protection', 'Block C', '28F', and 'AGRI 301'. The log must also include a Quantity with Value '6', Label 'Protection Duration', and Unit 'hours'.
